containers.name: train-final
args: set -e; export HOME=/shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar; export HF_HOME=/shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar/.cache/huggingface; export HF_TOKEN=''; export PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1; export GIT_CONFIG_NOSYSTEM=1; export GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null; cd /shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar/nn-dataset; export PYTHONPATH=/shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar/nn-dataset:$PYTHONPATH; echo '--- Installing dependencies ---'; python3 -m pip install --user --upgrade 'filelock>=3.13.1'; python3 -m pip install -e . -q 2>&1 | tail -5; echo '--- GPU Check ---'; python3 -c "import torch; print(f'CUDA: {torch.cuda.is_available()}, GPUs: {torch.cuda.device_count()}'); [print(f'  GPU {i}: {torch.cuda.get_device_name(i)}') for i in range(torch.cuda.device_count())]"; echo '--- Phase 2: Final Training ---'; python3 train_final.py 2>&1; echo '--- Phase 2 Finished ---'
